{"type":"tool_use","timestamp":1784416714953,"sessionID":"ses_08879f941ffeNhrOvIaWgfZo3Q","part":{"type":"tool","tool":"write","callID":"call_1659b8c5a3584814b30||thought_signature||","state":{"status":"completed","input":{"filePath":"/tmp/get_gpu_info.py","content":"import json\nimport torch\n\ndef main():\n    try:\n        visible_device_count = torch.cuda.device_count()\n        if visible_device_count > 0:\n            device_name = torch.cuda.get_device_name(0)\n            gcn_arch = torch.cuda.get_device_properties(0).gcnArchName\n        else:\n            device_name = \"N/A\"\n            gcn_arch = \"N/A\"\n            \n        report = {\n            \"visible_device_count\": visible_device_count,\n            \"device_name\": device_name,\n            \"gcn_arch\": gcn_arch\n        }\n        \n        with open(\"/app/gpu_report.json\", \"w\") as f:\n            json.dump(report, f, indent=4)\n            \n        print(\"Successfully wrote GPU report.\")\n        print(json.dumps(report, indent=4))\n    except Exception as e:\n        print(f\"Error: {e}\")\n\nif __name__ == \"__main__\":\n    main()\n"},"output":"Wrote file successfully.","metadata":{"diagnostics":{},"filepath":"/tmp/get_gpu_info.py","exists":false,"truncated":false},"title":"tmp/get_gpu_info.py","time":{"start":1784416714946,"end":1784416714952}},"id":"prt_f778640be001ZgopYpHAWU4lY4","sessionID":"ses_08879f941ffeNhrOvIaWgfZo3Q","messageID":"msg_f77862c24001xPF6SeBajtMoeG"}}
